h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner continues applying the same checking procedure and inking actions as established in previous turns.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner only repeats, confirms, and carries out the prescribed physical actions without introducing any new device, criterion, or productive action.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: No pressure, resistance, or breakdown occurs, and the tutor simply repeats and confirms the same checking routine across all turns.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no later tutor turn that adapts to a learner's revised framing; the tutor continues the same plan of verifying the label and inking.

learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner only repeats, confirms, and carries out the prescribed physical actions without introducing any new device, criterion, or productive action.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no later tutor turn that adapts to a learner's revised framing; the tutor continues the same plan of verifying the label and inking.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: No pressure, resistance, or breakdown occurs, and the tutor simply repeats and confirms the same checking routine across all turns.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: No pressure, resistance, or breakdown occurs, and the tutor simply repeats and confirms the same checking routine across all turns.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner continues sorting forces by source contact with increasing precision, which is exactly what the prior turns were building toward.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: Earth down, table normal up. Hand contact at the left edge pushes into the cart, so the hand arrow points right on the cart. I am keeping it on the contact, away from the travel card.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner independently constructs a full force diagram on a blank cart — placing arrows for Earth, table normal, and hand contact — and explicitly applies the contact criterion, showing productive performance of the taught device.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: No learner turn creates pressure that breaks the tutor's strategy; the tutor steadily narrows the task by supplying the blank cart and hand card, which continues the same sorting-by-source approach.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No pivot learner turn exists, so no later tutor uptake adapting to a revised learner framing can be scored.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: Earth down, table normal up. Hand contact at the left edge pushes into the cart, so the hand arrow points right on the cart. I am keeping it on the contact, away from the travel card.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner independently constructs a full force diagram on a blank cart — placing arrows for Earth, table normal, and hand contact — and explicitly applies the contact criterion, showing productive performance of the taught device.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: No pivot learner turn exists, so no later tutor uptake adapting to a revised learner framing can be scored.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: No learner turn creates pressure that breaks the tutor's strategy; the tutor steadily narrows the task by supplying the blank cart and hand card, which continues the same sorting-by-source approach.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: No learner turn creates pressure that breaks the tutor's strategy; the tutor steadily narrows the task by supplying the blank cart and hand card, which continues the same sorting-by-source approach.
